page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 310 GB of system memory. The instance includes a single NVIDIA A10 GPU from the Ampere architecture, providing 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not include any local storage, requiring external network storage solutions, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates top-tier performance in large language model inference tasks. For a small 135M model, it achieves prompt processing speeds of 9711.08 tokens per second and text generation speeds of 456.51 tokens per second. For a medium 7B model, prompt processing reaches 2509.43 tokens per second with text generation at 90.44 tokens per second. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and Geekbench image processing also show strong performance, while standard CPU, memory, and database operations perform within the average range.

The hardware profile offers high resource density for GPU-accelerated workloads, representing a balanced cost-to-performance ratio for machine learning tasks that do not require massive multi-GPU configurations. However, the complete absence of local storage is a key tradeoff, necessitating reliance on network-attached storage which may impact I/O-intensive operations. This instance is highly suited for medium-scale LLM inference, image processing, multi-threaded decompression, and GPU-accelerated compute workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs at 2.9 GHz, 310 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth but lacks local storage. Benchmarks highlight top-tier performance in LLM inference, achieving 2509.43 tokens per second for 7B model prompt processing, alongside strong multi-threaded decompression and image processing capabilities. Standard CPU and memory operations perform in the average tier. The lack of local storage requires network-attached storage, making this instance a specialized choice for medium-scale machine learning inference, image processing, and GPU-driven compute workloads where local high-speed disk I/O is not the primary bottleneck.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU. It excels in LLM inference and image processing but lacks local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge features 48 vCPUs, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU, delivering top-tier performance for LLM inference.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and an NVIDIA A10 GPU, optimized for medium-scale machine learning inference workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.9 GHz
Single NVIDIA A10 Ampere GPU with 24 GB of VRAM
310 GB of system memory and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier performance in LLM inference for small and medium models
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Best suited for machine learning inference, image processing, and GPU compute
